(** * Triangulated categories *)
(** ** Contents
- Triangles, rotations of triangles, and cones
- Pretriangulated data
- Distinguished triangles (DTri) and extensions
- Pretriangulated categories
- Triangulated categories
- Rotations of morphisms and extensions
- Composition of consecutive morphisms in DTri is 0
- Exact sequences associated to a distinguished triangle
- Five lemma for distinguished triangles
- Change of triangles in octahedral axiom
*)

Require Export UniMath.Tactics.EnsureStructuredProofs.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.AbelianGroups.

[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Morphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AdditiveFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FiveLemma.

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

(** * Triangulated categories *)
(** ** Introduction
A triangulated category Tr consists of an additive category A together with the following data
- An additive equivalence T : A -> A, called a translation functor.
- A collection of triangles in A, that is, a collection of diagrams of the form
                           X -f-> Y -g-> Z -h-> X[1]
  which are called distinguished triangles. Such a diagram is denoted by (X, Y, Z, f, g, h).
and these data must satisfy the following conditions
(TR1) For all objects X of A the triangle (X, X, 0, Id_X, 0, 0) is distinguished.
(TR2) Any triangle isomorphic to a distinguished triangle is a distinguished triangle.
(TR3) A triangle (X, Y, Z, f, g, h) is distinguished if and only if the rotated triangle
      (Y, Z, T X, g, h, - T f) is distinguished.
(TR4) For any morphism f : X --> Y one has a triangle (X, Y, Z, f, g, h) for some object Z and
      morphisms g and h. The object Z is called the cone of f.
(TR5) Suppose you have two distinguished triangle (X, Y, Z, f, g, h) and (X', Y', Z', f', g', h')
      and morphisms φ1 : X --> X' and φ2 : Y --> Y' such that the following diagram is commutative
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z  -h-> X[1]
                             φ1 |    φ2 |
                                X' -f-> Y' -g-> Z' -h-> X'[1]
      Then there exists a morphism φ3 : Z --> Z' such that the following diagram is commutative
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z   -h->  X[1]
                             φ1 |    φ2 |   φ3 |     φ1[1] |
                                X' -f-> Y' -g-> Z' -h'-> X'[1].
      Such a commutative diagram is called a morphism of triangles.
(TR6) (Octahedral axiom). Suppose you have 3 distinguished triangles (X1, Y1, Z2, f, g, h),
      (Y1, Z1, X2, f', g', h'), and (X1, Z1, Y2, f · f', g'', h''). Then there exists a
      distinguished triangle (Z2, Y2, X2, f''', g''', h'' · g[1]) such that the following diagram
      is commutative

                              X1 ----f----> Y1 ----g----> Z2 ----h----> X1[1]
                              ||            |             |              ||
                              ||         f' |        f''' |              ||
                              ||            |             |              ||
                              X1  -f·f'->  Z1  --g''-->  Y2 ----h''---> X1[1]
                                            |             |              |
                                         g' |        g''' |         f[1] |
                                            |             |              |
                                            X2  ========  X2 ----h'----> Y1[1]
                                            |             |
                                         h' |    h'·g[1] |
                                            |             |
                                         Y1[1] --g[1]-> Z2[1]

     This version of octahedral axiom corresponds to Axiom D of
     http://math-www.uni-paderborn.de/user/hubery/static/Octahedral.pdf


We call the data for triangulated category which satisfies (TR1)-(TR5) a pretriangulated category.
 *)

Local Opaque ishinh.

(** * Basic notions *)
(** ** Introduction
In this section we define

- Triangles. Diagrams of the form
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z  -h-> X[1]

- Morphisms of triangles. Commutative diagrams of the form
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z  -h->  X[1]
                             φ1 |    φ2 |   φ3 |    φ1[1] |
                                X' -f-> Y' -g-> Z' -h-> X'[1].

- Rotations of triangles. Rotation of
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z  -h-> X[1]
  is the triangle
                                Y  -g-> Z  -h-> X[1] -(-f[1])-> Y[1]

- Inverse rotation of triangle. Inverse rotation of
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z  -h-> X[1]
  is the triangle
                                Z[-1] -(-h[-1])-> X -f-> Y -g-> Z

- Rotations of morphisms. Let
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z   -h->  X[1]
                             φ1 |    φ2 |   φ3 |     φ1[1] |
                                X' -f-> Y' -g-> Z' -h'-> X'[1].
  be a morphism of triangles. Then
                                Y  -g-> Z  -h->  X[1] -f[1]->  Y[1]
                             φ2 |   φ3 |    φ1[1] |       φ2[1] |
                                Y' -g-> Z' -h-> X'[1] -f[1]-> Y'[1].
  is the rotation of the morphism. Similarly for inverse rotations of morphisms.

- ConeData to triangles. A ConeData for a morphism f : x --> y consists of
  - An object z
  - A morphism y --> z
  - A morphism z --> x[1]

*)
Section def_triangles.

  Context {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure}.
  Context {T : AddEquiv A A}.


  (** ** Triangles *)

  Definition Tri : UU := ∑ MP : MorphismPair A, A⟦Ob3 MP, (AddEquiv1 T) (Ob1 MP)⟧.

  Definition make_Tri {x y z : ob A} (f : x --> y) (g : y --> z) (h : A⟦z, (AddEquiv1 T x)⟧) : Tri :=
    (make_MorphismPair f g),,h.

  Definition TriMP (D : Tri) : MorphismPair A := pr1 D.
  Coercion TriMP : Tri >-> MorphismPair.

  (** Follows the naming convention Mor1, Mor2, for MorphismPair *)
  Definition Mor3 (D : Tri) : A⟦Ob3 D, (AddEquiv1 T) (Ob1 D)⟧ := pr2 D.


  (** ** Morphisms of triangles *)

  Definition TriMor (D1 D2 : Tri) : UU :=
    ∑ (M : MPMor D1 D2), (MPMor3 M) · (Mor3 D2) = (Mor3 D1) · (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)).

  Definition make_TriMor {D1 D2 : Tri} (M : MPMor D1 D2)
             (H : (MPMor3 M) · (Mor3 D2) = (Mor3 D1) · (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))) :
    TriMor D1 D2 := (M,,H).

  Definition TriMor_Mors {D1 D2 : Tri} (DTM : TriMor D1 D2) : MPMor D1 D2 := pr1 DTM.
  Coercion TriMor_Mors : TriMor >-> MPMor.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity x · f = f · identity y

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity x · f = f · identity y

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = f · identity y
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = f
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
identity (Ob3 D) · Mor3 D =
Mor3 D · # (AddEquiv1 T) (identity (Ob1 D))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
identity (Ob3 D) · Mor3 D =
Mor3 D · # (AddEquiv1 T) (identity (Ob1 D))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
identity (Ob3 D) · Mor3 D =
Mor3 D · identity (AddEquiv1 T (Ob1 D))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
Mor3 D = Mor3 D · identity (AddEquiv1 T (Ob1 D))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
Mor3 D = Mor3 D
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
TriMor D D

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
TriMor D D

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor D D
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor3 ?M · Mor3 D =
Mor3 D · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 ?M)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor D D
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMorMors D D
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMorComms ?MPM

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMorMors D D
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
A ⟦ Ob1 D, Ob1 D ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
A ⟦ Ob2 D, Ob2 D ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
A ⟦ Ob3 D, Ob3 D ⟧

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
A ⟦ Ob1 D, Ob1 D ⟧
 exact (identity _).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
A ⟦ Ob2 D, Ob2 D ⟧
 exact (identity _).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
A ⟦ Ob3 D, Ob3 D ⟧
 exact (identity _).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D))) · Mor1 D =
Mor1 D
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D))) · Mor2 D =
Mor2 D
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D))) · Mor1 D =
Mor1 D
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
 exact (TriMorId_comms _).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D))) · Mor2 D =
Mor2 D
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
 exact (TriMorId_comms _).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
        (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
     (make_MPMorComms
        (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
           (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
        (TriMorId_comms (Mor1 D))
        (TriMorId_comms (Mor2 D)))) · Mor3 D =
Mor3 D
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
             (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
          (make_MPMorComms
             (make_MPMorMors (identity (Ob1 D))
                (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
             (TriMorId_comms (Mor1 D))
             (TriMorId_comms (Mor2 D)))))
 exact (TriMorId_comm3 D).
  Defined.

  Definition DComm3 {D1 D2 : Tri} (TM : TriMor D1 D2) :
    (MPMor3 TM) · (Mor3 D2) = (Mor3 D1) · (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM)) := pr2 TM.

  (** *** Composition of morphisms is a morphism *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)) · Mor1 D3 =
Mor1 D1
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
       (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
       (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)) · Mor2 D3 =
Mor2 D1
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
       (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
       (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)) · Mor1 D3 =
Mor1 D1
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
       (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
       (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2 · Mor1 D3 =
Mor1 D1 · (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor1 TM1 · (MPMor1 TM2 · Mor1 D3) =
Mor1 D1 · (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor1 TM1 · (Mor1 D2 · MPMor2 TM2) =
Mor1 D1 · (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor1 TM1 · Mor1 D2 · MPMor2 TM2 =
Mor1 D1 · (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2 =
Mor1 D1 · (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2 =
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)) · Mor2 D3 =
Mor2 D1
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
       (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
       (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2 · Mor2 D3 =
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor2 TM1 · (MPMor2 TM2 · Mor2 D3) =
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor2 TM1 · (Mor2 D2 · MPMor3 TM2) =
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor2 TM1 · Mor2 D2 · MPMor3 TM2 =
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2 =
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2 =
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2 · Mor3 D3 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2 · Mor3 D3 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)

T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor3 TM1 · (MPMor3 TM2 · Mor3 D3) =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor3 TM1 · (Mor3 D2 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM2)) =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor3 TM1 · Mor3 D2 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM2) =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1)
· # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM2) =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor3 D1
· (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM2)) =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2) =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

TM2: TriMor D2 D3

T: AddEquiv A A

Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 ?M)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor D1 D3
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMorMors D1 D3

T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMorComms ?MPM

D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMorMors D1 D3
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
A ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D3 ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
A ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D3 ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
A ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D3 ⟧

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
A ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D3 ⟧
 exact (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
A ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D3 ⟧
 exact (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
A ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D3 ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
     (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
     (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))
 exact (TriMor_comp_comms TM1 TM2).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
TM1: TriMor D1 D2
TM2: TriMor D2 D3
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
        (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
        (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))
     (TriMor_comp_comms TM1 TM2)) · Mor3 D3 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors (MPMor1 TM1 · MPMor1 TM2)
             (MPMor2 TM1 · MPMor2 TM2)
             (MPMor3 TM1 · MPMor3 TM2))
          (TriMor_comp_comms TM1 TM2)))
 exact (TriMor_comp_comm3 TM1 TM2).
  Defined.


  (** ** is isomorphism *)

  Definition TriMor_is_iso {D1 D2 : Tri} (M : TriMor D1 D2) : UU :=
    (is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)) × (is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M))
                                  × (is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)).

  Definition TriMor_is_iso1 {D1 D2 : Tri} {M : TriMor D1 D2} (Ti : TriMor_is_iso M) :
    is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M) := dirprod_pr1 Ti.

  Definition TriMor_is_iso2 {D1 D2 : Tri} {M : TriMor D1 D2} (Ti : TriMor_is_iso M) :
    is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M) := dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 Ti).

  Definition TriMor_is_iso3 {D1 D2 : Tri} {M : TriMor D1 D2} (Ti : TriMor_is_iso M) :
    is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M) := dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 Ti).

  Definition make_TriMor_is_iso {D1 D2 : Tri} {M : TriMor D1 D2}
             (H1 : is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M))
             (H2 : is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M))
             (H3 : is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)) :
    TriMor_is_iso M := (H1,,(H2,,H3)).

  (** *** Composition of is isomorphism is isomorphism *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
TriMor_is_iso (TriMor_comp M1 M2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
TriMor_is_iso (TriMor_comp M1 M2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 (TriMor_comp M1 M2))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 (TriMor_comp M1 M2))

M2: TriMor D2 D3

T: AddEquiv A A

i2: TriMor_is_iso M2

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M1)
 exact (TriMor_is_iso1 i1).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M2)
 exact (TriMor_is_iso1 i2).

M2: TriMor D2 D3

 exact (TriMor_is_iso3 i1).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriMor D1 D2
M2: TriMor D2 D3
i1: TriMor_is_iso M1
i2: TriMor_is_iso M2
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M2)
 exact (TriMor_is_iso3 i2).
  Defined.

  (** *** Construction of an inverse and the fact that it is isomorphism *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
· Mor1 D1 =
Mor1 D2
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
· Mor2 D1 =
Mor2 D2
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
· Mor1 D1 =
Mor1 D2
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti) · Mor1 D1 =
Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor1 M
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti) · Mor1 D1) =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor1 M
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti) · Mor1 D1)
· MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
· MPMor2 M

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor1 M · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)
· Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
· MPMor2 M

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
identity (Ob1 D1) · Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
· MPMor2 M
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
· MPMor2 M

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti)
   · MPMor2 M)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M
· (Mor1 D2
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti)
      · MPMor2 M))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M =
MPMor1 M · (Mor1 D2 · identity (Ob2 D2))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M = MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2

      exact (! MPComm1 M).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
· Mor2 D1 =
Mor2 D2
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti) · Mor2 D1 =
Mor2 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor2 M
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti) · Mor2 D1) =
MPMor2 M
· (Mor2 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor2 M
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti) · Mor2 D1)
· MPMor3 M =
MPMor2 M
· (Mor2 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti))
· MPMor3 M

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor2 M · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti)
· Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M =
MPMor2 M
· (Mor2 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti))
· MPMor3 M

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
identity (Ob2 D1) · Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M =
MPMor2 M
· (Mor2 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti))
· MPMor3 M
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M =
MPMor2 M
· (Mor2 D2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti))
· MPMor3 M

   · MPMor3 M)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M =
MPMor2 M
· (Mor2 D2
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)
      · MPMor3 M))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M =
MPMor2 M · (Mor2 D2 · identity (Ob3 D2))

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M = MPMor2 M · Mor2 D2

      exact (! MPComm2 M).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
     (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti)) · Mor3 D1 =
Mor3 D2
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
          (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti)))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
     (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti)) · Mor3 D1 =
Mor3 D2
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
          (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti) · Mor3 D1 =
Mor3 D2
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor3 M
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti) · Mor3 D1) =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor3 M · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)
· Mor3 D1 =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)))

T: AddEquiv A A

M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
identity (Ob3 D1) · Mor3 D1 =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)))
· # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
   · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · (# (AddEquiv1 T)
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
      · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2
   · # (AddEquiv1 T)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)
        · MPMor1 M))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M
· (Mor3 D2 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (identity (Ob1 D2)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M · (Mor3 D2 · identity (AddEquiv1 T (Ob1 D2)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) =
MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2 = MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

TriMor D2 D1

D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
A ⟦ Ob1 D2, Ob1 D1 ⟧
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti)).

T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
A ⟦ Ob2 D2, Ob2 D1 ⟧
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti)).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri

Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
A ⟦ Ob3 D2, Ob3 D1 ⟧
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
 exact (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
Ti: TriMor_is_iso M
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
     (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti)) · Mor3 D1 =
Mor3 D2
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso1 Ti))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 Ti))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 Ti)))
          (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm Ti)))
 exact (TriMor_is_iso_to_inv_Comm3 Ti).
  Defined.

  (** ** Isomorphisms of triangles *)

  Definition TriIso (D1 D2 : Tri) : UU := ∑ M : TriMor D1 D2, TriMor_is_iso M.

  Definition make_TriIso {D1 D2 : Tri} (M : TriMor D1 D2) (H : TriMor_is_iso M) : TriIso D1 D2 :=
    (M,,H).

  Definition TriIsoMor {D1 D2 : Tri} (I : TriIso D1 D2) : TriMor D1 D2 := pr1 I.
  Coercion TriIsoMor : TriIso >-> TriMor.

  Definition TriIso_is_iso {D1 D2 : Tri} (I : TriIso D1 D2) : TriMor_is_iso I := pr2 I.
  Coercion TriIso_is_iso : TriIso >-> TriMor_is_iso.

  (** *** Composition of isomorphisms *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriIso D1 D2
M2: TriIso D2 D3
TriIso D1 D3

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriIso D1 D2
M2: TriIso D2 D3
TriIso D1 D3

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriIso D1 D2
M2: TriIso D2 D3
TriMor D1 D3
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriIso D1 D2
M2: TriIso D2 D3
TriMor_is_iso ?M

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriIso D1 D2
M2: TriIso D2 D3
TriMor D1 D3
 exact (TriMor_comp M1 M2).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2, D3: Tri
M1: TriIso D1 D2
M2: TriIso D2 D3
TriMor_is_iso (TriMor_comp M1 M2)
 exact (TriMor_is_iso_comp (TriIso_is_iso M1) (TriIso_is_iso M2)).
  Defined.

  (** *** Inverse of an isomorphism *)

TriIso D2 D1

TriMor D2 D1
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
I: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor_is_iso ?M

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
I: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor D2 D1
 exact (TriMor_is_iso_inv (TriIso_is_iso I)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
I: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor_is_iso (TriMor_is_iso_inv I)
 exact (TriMor_is_iso_inv_is_iso (TriIso_is_iso I)).
  Defined.

  (** *** Identity isomorphism *)

D: Tri

D: Tri
TriMor_is_iso ?M

T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
TriMor D D
 exact (TriMorId D).

T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
TriMor_is_iso (TriMorId D)

D: Tri

D: Tri

D: Tri

 exact (is_z_isomorphism_identity _).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 (TriMorId D))
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_identity _).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D: Tri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 (TriMorId D))
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_identity _).
  Defined.

 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _).

x: A
A ⟦ to_Zero A, AddEquiv1 T x ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _).
  Defined.

 exact (Mor2 D · (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso T (Ob3 D)))).
  Defined.


  (** ** Rotation and inverse rotation of a morphism *)
  (** *** See the diagram in the introduction *)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor2 M)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor2 M)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor2 M))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)
   · # (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor2 M))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M) · # (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1) · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor2 M)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1) · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor2 M)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv1 T) (Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M

    exact (MPComm1 M).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri

TriMor (RotTri D1) (RotTri D2)

MPMor3 ?M · Mor3 (RotTri D2) =
Mor3 (RotTri D1) · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 ?M)

T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri

T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2

 exact (MPMor2 M).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
A ⟦ Ob2 (RotTri D1), Ob2 (RotTri D2) ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 M).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
A ⟦ Ob3 (RotTri D1), Ob3 (RotTri D2) ⟧
 exact (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
     (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
     (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))) · Mor1 (RotTri D2) =
Mor1 (RotTri D1)
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
       (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
     (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))) · Mor2 (RotTri D2) =
Mor2 (RotTri D1)
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
       (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
     (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))) · Mor1 (RotTri D2) =
Mor1 (RotTri D1)
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
       (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
 exact (MPComm2 M).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
     (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))) · Mor2 (RotTri D2) =
Mor2 (RotTri D1)
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
       (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
 exact (DComm3 M).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
        (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
     (make_MPMorComms
        (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
           (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))) (MPComm2 M)
        (DComm3 M))) · Mor3 (RotTri D2) =
Mor3 (RotTri D1)
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
             (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
          (make_MPMorComms
             (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 M) (MPMor3 M)
                (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M)))
             (MPComm2 M) (DComm3 M))))
 exact (RotTriMor_Comm3 M).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
# (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M)
· (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D2))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2))) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor1 M

· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor1 M

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
tmp:= maponpaths # (AddEquiv2 T) (DComm3 M): # (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
# (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor1 M

D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
tmp:= maponpaths # (AddEquiv2 T) (DComm3 M): # (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv2 T) (Mor3 D1)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor1 M

· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =

D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2

· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1)) · MPMor1 M

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
tmp:= AddEquivUnitComm T (Ob1 D1) (Ob1 D2) (MPMor1 M): MPMor1 M · AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2) =
AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv1 T ∙ AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor1 M)
# (AddEquiv2 T) (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1)) · MPMor1 M
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
tmp:= AddEquivUnitComm T (Ob1 D1) (Ob1 D2) (MPMor1 M): MPMor1 M · Core.unit_from_are_adjoints T (Ob1 D2) =
Core.unit_from_are_adjoints T (Ob1 D1)
· # (AddEquiv2 T) (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
# (AddEquiv2 T) (# (AddEquiv1 T) (MPMor1 M))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D2)) =
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso T (Ob1 D1)) · MPMor1 M

    use (! AddEquivUnitInv T (MPMor1 M)).
  Qed.

D1, D2: Tri

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors (# (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M))
        (MPMor1 M) (MPMor2 M))
     (make_MPMorComms
        (make_MPMorMors (# (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M))
           (MPMor1 M) (MPMor2 M))
        (InvRotTriMor_Comm1 M) (MPComm1 M)))
· Mor3 (InvRotTri D2) =
Mor3 (InvRotTri D1)
· # (AddEquiv1 T)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors (# (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M))
             (MPMor1 M) (MPMor2 M))
          (make_MPMorComms
             (make_MPMorMors
                (# (AddEquiv2 T) (MPMor3 M))
                (MPMor1 M) (MPMor2 M))
             (InvRotTriMor_Comm1 M) (MPComm1 M))))
 exact (InvRotTriMor_Comm3 M).
  Defined.

T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 (InvRotTriMor M))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 (InvRotTriMor M))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 (InvRotTriMor M))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 (InvRotTriMor M))
 exact (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv2 T) (TriMor_is_iso3 H)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 (InvRotTriMor M))
 exact (TriMor_is_iso1 H).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H: TriMor_is_iso M
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 (InvRotTriMor M))
 exact (TriMor_is_iso2 H).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriIso D1 D2
TriIso (InvRotTri D1) (InvRotTri D2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriIso D1 D2
TriIso (InvRotTri D1) (InvRotTri D2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor (InvRotTri D1) (InvRotTri D2)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor_is_iso ?M

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor (InvRotTri D1) (InvRotTri D2)
 exact (InvRotTriMor M).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
D1, D2: Tri
M: TriIso D1 D2
TriMor_is_iso (InvRotTriMor M)
 exact (InvRotTriMor_is_iso (TriIso_is_iso M)).
  Defined.


  (** ** Cone data *)

  Definition ConeData {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure} (T : AddEquiv A A) (x y : ob A) : UU :=
    ∑ (z : ob A), A⟦y, z⟧ × A⟦z, (AddEquiv1 T x)⟧.

  Definition make_ConeData {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure} (T : AddEquiv A A) {x y z : ob A} (g : y --> z)
             (h : z --> (AddEquiv1 T x)) : ConeData T x y := (z,,(g,,h)).

  Definition ConeDataOb {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure} {T : AddEquiv A A} {x y : ob A} (C : ConeData T x y) :
    ob A := pr1 C.
  Coercion ConeDataOb : ConeData >-> ob.

  Definition ConeData1 {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure} {T : AddEquiv A A} {x y : ob A} (C : ConeData T x y) :
    A⟦y, C⟧ := dirprod_pr1 (pr2 C).

  Definition ConeData2 {A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure} {T : AddEquiv A A} {x y : ob A} (C : ConeData T x y) :
    A⟦C, (AddEquiv1 T x)⟧ := dirprod_pr2 (pr2 C).

End def_triangles.


(** * Data for pretriangulated categories *)
Section def_pretriang_data.

  (** ** PreTriangData *)

  (** Data for pretriangulated category consists of
   - An additive category A
   - An additive equivalence T : A -> A
   - A subtype for triangles in (A, T), called the distinguished triangles.
   *)
  Definition PreTriangData : UU :=
    ∑ D : (∑ A : (CategoryWithAdditiveStructure), (AddEquiv A A)), hsubtype (@Tri (pr1 D) (pr2 D)).

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
PreTriangData

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
PreTriangData

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
∑ A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure, AddEquiv A A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
(λ D : ∑ A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure,
       AddEquiv A A, hsubtype Tri) ?pr1

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
∑ A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure, AddEquiv A A
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
(λ A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure, AddEquiv A A)
  ?pr1

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
 exact A.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
(λ A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure, AddEquiv A A) A
 exact T.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
T: AddEquiv A A
H: hsubtype Tri
(λ D : ∑ A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure,
       AddEquiv A A, hsubtype Tri) (A,, T)
 exact H.
  Defined.

  Definition PreTriangData_Additive (PTD : PreTriangData) : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure := pr1 (pr1 PTD).
  Coercion PreTriangData_Additive : PreTriangData >-> CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.

  Definition Trans {PTD : PreTriangData} : AddEquiv PTD PTD := pr2 (pr1 PTD).

  Definition isDTri {PTD : PreTriangData} (T : @Tri PTD Trans) : hProp := (pr2 PTD) T.

  (** Construction of a triangle in PTD from ConeData *)
  
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
Tri

  
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
Tri

    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD ⟦ ?x, ?y ⟧
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD ⟦ ?y, ?z ⟧
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD ⟦ ?z, AddEquiv1 Trans ?x ⟧

    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD
 exact x.
    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD
 exact y.
    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD
 exact D.
    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
 exact f.
    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD ⟦ y, D ⟧
 exact (ConeData1 D).
    
PTD: PreTriangData
x, y: PTD
f: PTD ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: ConeData Trans x y
PTD ⟦ D, AddEquiv1 Trans x ⟧
 exact (ConeData2 D).
  Defined.

End def_pretriang_data.


(** * Distinguished triangles and extentions *)
(** ** Inroduction
In this section we define data for
- Distinguished triangles
- Extentions of morphisms
*)
Section def_pretriangulated_data.

  Context {PTD : PreTriangData}.

  (** ** Distinguished triangles *)

  Definition DTri : UU := ∑ (T : @Tri _ (@Trans PTD)), isDTri T.

  Definition make_DTri {x y z : ob PTD} (f : x --> y) (g : y --> z)
             (h : z --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x)) (H : isDTri (make_Tri f g h)) :
    DTri := ((make_Tri f g h),,H).

  Definition make_DTri' (T : @Tri _ (@Trans PTD)) (H : isDTri T) :
    DTri := (T,,H).

  Definition DTriTri (D : DTri) : Tri := pr1 D.
  Coercion DTriTri : DTri >-> Tri.

  Definition DTriisDTri (D : DTri) : isDTri D := pr2 D.


  (** ** Extensions *)

  Definition TExt {D1 D2 : DTri} {f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2} {f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2}
             (H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2) : UU :=
    ∑ f3 : Ob3 D1 --> Ob3 D2, (Mor2 D1 · f3 = f2 · Mor2 D2)
                              × (Mor3 D1 · (# (AddEquiv1 (@Trans PTD)) f1) = f3 · Mor3 D2).

  Definition make_TExt {D1 D2 : DTri} {f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2} {f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2}
             {H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2} (f3 : Ob3 D1 --> Ob3 D2)
             (H2 : Mor2 D1 · f3 = f2 · Mor2 D2)
             (H3 : Mor3 D1 · (# (AddEquiv1 (@Trans PTD)) f1) = f3 · Mor3 D2) :
    TExt H := (f3,,(H2,,H3)).

  Definition TExt_Mor {D1 D2 : DTri} {f1 : Ob1 (DTriTri D1) --> Ob1 D2} {f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2}
             {H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2} (TE : TExt H) : PTD⟦Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2⟧ := pr1 TE.
  Coercion TExt_Mor : TExt >-> precategory_morphisms.

  Definition TExtComm1 {D1 D2 : DTri} {f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2} {f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2}
             {H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2} (TE : TExt H) :
    Mor2 D1 · TE = f2 · Mor2 D2 := dirprod_pr1 (pr2 TE).

  Definition TExtComm2 {D1 D2 : DTri} {f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2} {f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2}
             {H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2} (TE : TExt H) :
    (Mor3 D1 · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1) = TE · Mor3 D2) := dirprod_pr2 (pr2 TE).

  
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
TriMor D1 D2

  
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
TriMor D1 D2

    
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor D1 D2
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor3 ?M · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 ?M)

    
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor D1 D2
 
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMorMors D1 D2
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMorComms ?MPM

      
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMorMors D1 D2
 
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
PTD ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

        
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
 exact f1.
        
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
 exact f2.
        
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
PTD ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
 exact TE.
      
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMorComms (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)
 
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor1 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE) · Mor1 D2 =
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor2 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE) · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)

        
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor1 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE) · Mor1 D2 =
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)
 exact H.
        
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor2 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE) · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)
 exact (! TExtComm1 TE).
    
PTD: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
f1: PTD ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PTD ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
TE: TExt H
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)
     (make_MPMorComms (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE) H
        (! TExtComm1 TE))) · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE)
          (make_MPMorComms (make_MPMorMors f1 f2 TE) H
             (! TExtComm1 TE))))
 exact (! TExtComm2 TE).
  Defined.

End def_pretriangulated_data.


(** * PreTriangulated categories *)
Section def_pretrangulated.

  (** *** isPreTriang
   - Trivial triangles are distinguished
   - Distinguished triangles are closed under isomorphism
   - Rotation of a distinguished triangle is distinguished
   - Inverse rotation of a distinguished triangle is distinguished
   - For every morphism f, there exists a completion to distinguished triangle
   - Commutative squares to morphisms of distinguished triangles
   *)
  Definition isPreTriang (PTD : PreTriangData) : UU :=
    (∏ (x : ob PTD), isDTri (TrivialTri x))
      × (∏ (T1 T2 : @Tri PTD Trans) (I : ∥ TriIso T1 T2 ∥), isDTri T1 -> isDTri T2)
      × (∏ (D : DTri), @isDTri PTD (RotTri D))
      × (∏ (D : DTri), @isDTri PTD (InvRotTri D))
      × (∏ (x y : ob PTD) (f : x --> y), ∥ ∑ D : ConeData Trans x y, isDTri (ConeTri f D) ∥)
      × (∏ (D1 D2 : DTri) (f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2) (f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2)
           (H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2), ∥ @TExt PTD _ _ _ _ H ∥).

  Definition make_isPreTriang {PTD : PreTriangData}
             (H1 : (∏ (x : ob PTD), isDTri (TrivialTri x)))
             (H2 : ∏ (T1 T2 : @Tri PTD Trans) (I : ∥ TriIso T1 T2 ∥), isDTri T1 -> isDTri T2)
             (H3 : ∏ (D : DTri), isDTri (RotTri D))
             (H4 : ∏ (D : DTri), isDTri (InvRotTri D))
             (H5 : ∏ (x y : ob PTD) (f : x --> y),
                   ∥ ∑ D : ConeData Trans x y, isDTri (ConeTri f D) ∥)
             (H6 : ∏ (D1 D2 : DTri) (f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2) (f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2)
                     (H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2), ∥ (@TExt PTD _ _ _ _ H) ∥) :
    isPreTriang PTD := (H1,,(H2,,(H3,,(H4,,(H5,,H6))))).

  (** *** Accessor functions *)
  Definition TrivialDTrisData {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) :
    ∏ (x : ob PTD), isDTri (TrivialTri x) := dirprod_pr1 iPT.

  
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
x: PTD
DTri

  
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
x: PTD
DTri

    
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
x: PTD
TDT:= TrivialDTrisData iPT x: isDTri (TrivialTri x)
DTri

    exact (make_DTri (identity x) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PTD) _ (to_Zero PTD))
                   (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PTD) _ (AddEquiv1 Trans x)) TDT).
  Defined.

  Definition DTrisUnderIso {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) :
    ∏ (T1 T2 : @Tri PTD Trans) (I : ∥ TriIso T1 T2 ∥), isDTri T1 -> isDTri T2 :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 iPT).

  Definition RotDTris {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) (D : @DTri PTD) :
    isDTri (RotTri D) := dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 iPT)) D.

  
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
D: DTri
DTri

  
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
D: DTri
DTri

    
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
D: DTri
D':= RotDTris iPT D: isDTri (RotTri D)
DTri

    exact (make_DTri' (RotTri D) D').
  Defined.

  Definition InvRotDTris {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) (D : @DTri PTD) :
    isDTri (InvRotTri D) := dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 iPT))) D.

  
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
D: DTri
DTri

  
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
D: DTri
DTri

    
PTD: PreTriangData
iPT: isPreTriang PTD
D: DTri
D':= InvRotDTris iPT D: isDTri (InvRotTri D)
DTri

    exact (make_DTri' (InvRotTri D) D').
  Defined.

  Definition DCompletion {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) :
    ∏ (x y : ob PTD) (f : x --> y), ∥ ∑ D : ConeData Trans x y, isDTri (ConeTri f D) ∥ :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 iPT)))).

  Definition DExts {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) :
    ∏ (D1 D2 : DTri) (f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2) (f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2)
      (H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2), ∥ @TExt PTD _ _ _ _ H ∥ :=
    dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 iPT)))).

  Definition DExt {PTD : PreTriangData} (iPT : isPreTriang PTD) (D1 D2 : DTri)
             (f1 : Ob1 D1 --> Ob1 D2) (f2 : Ob2 D1 --> Ob2 D2) (H : f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2) :
    ∥ TExt H ∥ := DExts iPT D1 D2 f1 f2 H.

  (** ** Pretriangulated category *)

  Definition PreTriang : UU := ∑ PTD : PreTriangData, isPreTriang PTD.

  Definition make_PreTriang (PTD : PreTriangData) (H : isPreTriang PTD) := (PTD,,H).

  (** Accessor functions for pretriangulated categories *)
  Definition PreTriang_PreTriangData (PT : PreTriang) : PreTriangData := pr1 PT.
  Coercion PreTriang_PreTriangData : PreTriang >-> PreTriangData.

  Definition PreTriang_isPreTriang (PT : PreTriang) : isPreTriang PT := pr2 PT.
  Coercion PreTriang_isPreTriang : PreTriang >-> isPreTriang.

End def_pretrangulated.
Arguments Trans {PTD} : simpl never.


(** * Triangulated categories **)
Section def_triangulated.

  (** ** Octahedral data *)

  (** (Octahedral axiom). Suppose you have 3 distinguished triangles (X1, Y1, Z2, f1, f2, f3),
      (Y1, Z1, X2, g1, g2, g3), and (X1, Z1, Y2, f1 · g1, h2, h3). Then there exists a
      distinguished triangle (Z2, Y2, X2, φ1, φ2, g3 · f2[1]) such that the following diagram
      is commutative

                              X1 ----f1----> Y1 ----f2----> Z2 ----f3----> X1[1]
                              ||            |             |              ||
                              ||         g1 |          φ1 |              ||
                              ||            |             |              ||
                              X1 -f1·g1->  Z1  ---h2-->  Y2 ----h3---> X1[1]
                                            |             |              |
                                         g2 |          φ2 |         f[1] |
                                            |             |              |
                                            X2  ========  X2 ----h''---> Y1[1]
                                            |             |
                                         g3 |   g3·f2[1] |
                                            |             |
                                         Y1[1] --f2[1]-> Z2[1]
   *)
  Definition Octa {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             (H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)) (H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3))
             (H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)) : UU :=
    ∑ D : ((z2 --> y2) × (y2 --> x2)),
          (isDTri (make_Tri (dirprod_pr1 D) (dirprod_pr2 D) (g3 · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f2))))
            × (dirprod_pr1 D · h3 = f3)
            × (h2 · dirprod_pr2 D = g2)
            × (f2 · dirprod_pr1 D = g1 · h2)
            × (dirprod_pr2 D · g3 = h3 · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1)).

  Definition make_Octa {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             (H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)) (H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3))
             (H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3))
             (φ1 : z2 --> y2) (φ2 : y2 --> x2)
             (H4 : isDTri (make_Tri φ1 φ2 (g3 · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f2))))
             (Comm1 : φ1 · h3 = f3) (Comm2 : h2 · φ2 = g2)
             (Comm3 : f2 · φ1 = g1 · h2)
             (Comm4 : φ2 · g3 = h3 · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1)) : Octa H1 H2 H3 :=
    ((φ1,,φ2),,(H4,,(Comm1,,(Comm2,,(Comm3,,Comm4))))).

  (** Accessor functions *)

  Definition OctaMor1 {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : PT⟦z2, y2⟧ := dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O).

  Definition OctaMor2 {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : PT⟦y2, x2⟧ := dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O).

  Definition OctaDTri {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : @DTri PT := make_DTri' _ (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 O)).

  Definition OctaComm1 {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : (OctaMor1 O) · h3 = f3 :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 O)).

  Definition OctaComm2 {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : h2 · (OctaMor2 O) = g2 :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 O))).

  Definition OctaComm3 {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : f2 · (OctaMor1 O) = g1 · h2 :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 O)))).

  Definition OctaComm4 {PT : PreTriang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)}
             (O : Octa H1 H2 H3) : (OctaMor2 O) · g3 = h3 · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1) :=
    dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 O)))).

  (** ** Triangulated category *)
  Definition Triang : UU :=
    ∑ PT : PreTriang,
           (∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT)
              (f1 : x1 --> y1) (f2 : y1 --> z2) (f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1))
              (g1 : y1 --> z1) (g2 : z1 --> x2) (g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1))
              (h2 : z1 --> y2) (h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1))
              (H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)) (H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3))
              (H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)), ∥ Octa H1 H2 H3 ∥).

  Definition make_Triang {PT : PreTriang} (H : ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob PT)
              (f1 : x1 --> y1) (f2 : y1 --> z2) (f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1))
              (g1 : y1 --> z1) (g2 : z1 --> x2) (g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1))
              (h2 : z1 --> y2) (h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1))
              (H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)) (H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3))
              (H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)), ∥ Octa H1 H2 H3 ∥) : Triang := (PT,,H).

  Definition Triang_PreTriang (TR : Triang) : PreTriang := pr1 TR.
  Coercion Triang_PreTriang : Triang >-> PreTriang.

  Definition Octahedral {TR : Triang} {x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 : ob TR}
             {f1 : x1 --> y1} {f2 : y1 --> z2} {f3 : z2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {g1 : y1 --> z1} {g2 : z1 --> x2} {g3 : x2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans y1)}
             {h2 : z1 --> y2} {h3 : y2 --> (AddEquiv1 Trans x1)}
             {H1 : isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)} {H2 : isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)}
             {H3 : isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)} :
    ∥ Octa H1 H2 H3 ∥ := (pr2 TR) x1 x2 y1 y2 z1 z2 f1 f2 f3 g1 g2 g3 h2 h3 H1 H2 H3.

End def_triangulated.


(** * Rotations and inverse rotations of morphisms, Extensions, and DTris *)
Section rotation_isos.

  Context {PT : PreTriang}.


  (** ** iso D InvRot (Rot D) and iso D Rot (InvRot D) *)

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
(AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
 :
 PT ⟦ Ob1 D, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))
 ⟧)
· (to_inv
     (# (AddEquiv2 Trans)
        (to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))) =
Mor1 D · identity (Ob2 D)

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
(AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
 :
 PT ⟦ Ob1 D, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))
 ⟧)
· (to_inv
     (# (AddEquiv2 Trans)
        (to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))) =
Mor1 D · identity (Ob2 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (to_inv
     (to_inv
        (# (AddEquiv2 Trans)
           (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))) =
Mor1 D · identity (Ob2 D)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))) =
Mor1 D · identity (Ob2 D)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))) =
Mor1 D

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)))
· AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D) =
Mor1 D · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))
   · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)) =
Mor1 D · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))
   · (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))
      · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D))) =
Mor1 D · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))
   · identity
       (AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D)))) =
Mor1 D · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) =
Mor1 D · AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob2 D)

    use (! (AddEquivUnitComm (@Trans PT) _ _ (Mor1 D))).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob2 D) · Mor2 D = Mor2 D · identity (Ob3 D)

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob2 D) · Mor2 D = Mor2 D · identity (Ob3 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob2 D) · Mor2 D = Mor2 D
 apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob3 D)
· (Mor3 D
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivCounitIso Trans
          (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D)))) =
Mor3 D
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob3 D)
· (Mor3 D
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivCounitIso Trans
          (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D)))) =
Mor3 D
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor3 D
· inv_from_z_iso
    (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))) =
Mor3 D
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
 use AddEquivCounitUnit.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
TriMor D (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
TriMor D (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor D (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor3 ?M · Mor3 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
Mor3 D · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 ?M)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor D (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMorMors D (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMorComms ?MPM

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMorMors D (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
PT ⟦ Ob1 D, Ob1 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) ⟧
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
PT ⟦ Ob2 D, Ob2 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) ⟧
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
PT ⟦ Ob3 D, Ob3 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) ⟧

        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
PT ⟦ Ob1 D, Ob1 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) ⟧
 exact (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)).
        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
PT ⟦ Ob2 D, Ob2 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) ⟧
 exact (identity _).
        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
PT ⟦ Ob3 D, Ob3 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) ⟧
 exact (identity _).
      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
· Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
Mor1 D
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
· Mor2 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
Mor2 D
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))

        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
· Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
Mor1 D
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
 exact (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm1 D).
        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
     (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
· Mor2 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
Mor2 D
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
       (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
 exact (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm2 D).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
        (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
     (make_MPMorComms
        (make_MPMorMors
           (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
           (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
        (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm1 D)
        (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm2 D)))
· Mor3 (InvRotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
Mor3 D
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors
             (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
             (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
          (make_MPMorComms
             (make_MPMorMors
                (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))
                (identity (Ob2 D)) (identity (Ob3 D)))
             (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm1 D)
             (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm2 D))))
 exact (RotInvIso_Mor_Comm3 D).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
TriMor_is_iso (RotInvIso_Mor D)

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
TriMor_is_iso (RotInvIso_Mor D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 (RotInvIso_Mor D))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 (RotInvIso_Mor D))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 (RotInvIso_Mor D))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 (RotInvIso_Mor D))
 exact (AddEquivUnitInvMor_is_iso_with_inv_data Trans (Ob1 D)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 (RotInvIso_Mor D))
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_identity (Ob2 D)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 (RotInvIso_Mor D))
 exact (is_z_isomorphism_identity (Ob3 D)).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D = Mor1 D · identity (Ob2 D)

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D = Mor1 D · identity (Ob2 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D = Mor1 D
 apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob2 D)
· (Mor2 D
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))) =
Mor2 D
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
identity (Ob2 D)
· (Mor2 D
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))) =
Mor2 D
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor2 D
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D)) =
Mor2 D
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
· to_inv
    (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D))
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)))) =
Mor3 D · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (identity (Ob1 D))

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
· to_inv
    (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D))
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)))) =
Mor3 D · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (identity (Ob1 D))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
· to_inv
    (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D))
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)))) =
Mor3 D · identity (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
· to_inv
    (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D))
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D)))) = Mor3 D
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
· to_inv
    (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (to_inv
          (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D)
           · inv_from_z_iso
               (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))))) =
Mor3 D

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D))
· to_inv
    (to_inv
       (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
          (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D)
           · inv_from_z_iso
               (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D))))) =

· Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · MPMor1 Mor
