# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp: inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp: inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
     (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))) =
AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
     (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))) =
AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· (# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
     (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))

    use (! AddEquivCounitUnit' Trans (Ob1 D2)).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm2 Mor: MPMor2 Mor · Mor2 (RotDTri PT D2) = Mor2 (RotDTri PT D1) · MPMor3 Mor
MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm2 Mor: MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · MPMor3 Mor
MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm2 Mor: MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · MPMor3 Mor
MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm2 Mor: MPMor2 Mor · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · MPMor3 Mor
Mor3 D1 · MPMor3 Mor =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
Mor3 D1 · MPMor3 Mor =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
     · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3 Mor =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 (RotDTri PT D1)))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 (RotDTri PT D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= AddEquivCounitUnit Trans (Ob1 D1): inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 (RotDTri PT D1)))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 (RotDTri PT D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp: inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))
inv_from_z_iso
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 (RotDTri PT D1)))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 (RotDTri PT D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
tmp: inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
      · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· (# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (Core.unit_from_are_adjoints Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
     · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
· AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
AddEquivCounit Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    exact (AddEquivCounitUnit' Trans (Ob1 D2)).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
TriMor D1 D2

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3 ?M · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 ?M)

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H

MPMorMors D1 D2
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMorComms ?MPM

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H

PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
 exact (((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)) : PT⟦_, _⟧)
                   · (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor))
                   · (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))).
        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
 exact (MPMor1 Mor).
        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
 exact (MPMor2 Mor).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors
     ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
       :
       PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
       AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
      · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
     (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors
     ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
       :
       PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
       AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
      · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
     (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor)) · Mor1 D2 =
Mor1 D1
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors
       ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
         :
         PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
         AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
        · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
       (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors
     ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
       :
       PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
       AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
      · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
     (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor)) · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors
       ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
         :
         PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
         AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
        · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
       (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))

        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors
     ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
       :
       PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
       AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
      · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
     (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor)) · Mor1 D2 =
Mor1 D1
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors
       ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
         :
         PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
         AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
        · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
       (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
 exact (ExtMor'_Comm1 D1 D2 Mor).
        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors
     ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
       :
       PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
       AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
      · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
     (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor)) · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors
       ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
         :
         PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
         AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
        · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
       (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
 exact (MPComm1 Mor).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
H: f2 · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · f3
Ext: TExt H
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor (RotDTri PT D1) (RotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors
        ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
          :
          PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
          AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
         · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
        (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
     (make_MPMorComms
        (make_MPMorMors
           ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
             :
             PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
             AddEquiv2 Trans
               (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
            · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
            · inv_from_z_iso
                (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
           (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
        (ExtMor'_Comm1 D1 D2 Mor) (MPComm1 Mor)))
· Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors
             ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
               :
               PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
               AddEquiv2 Trans
                 (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
              · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
              · inv_from_z_iso
                  (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
             (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
          (make_MPMorComms
             (make_MPMorMors
                ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
                  :
                  PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
                  AddEquiv2 Trans
                    (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
                 · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (MPMor3 Mor)
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
                (MPMor1 Mor) (MPMor2 Mor))
             (ExtMor'_Comm1 D1 D2 Mor) (MPComm1 Mor))))
 exact (ExtMor'_Comm3 D1 D2 Mor).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
let D1' := InvRotDTri PT D1 in
let D2' := InvRotDTri PT D2 in
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3
· (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
let D1' := InvRotDTri PT D1 in
let D2' := InvRotDTri PT D2 in
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3
· (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3
· (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4

D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· (AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2))

f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),

· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)

   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)

· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3

· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)

  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)) =

   · AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),

H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3 · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D2)

H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3 · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =

D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri

· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =

D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri

· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1) · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4

D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
· AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
tmp:= is_inverse_in_precat2
  (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)): inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1) =
identity (AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
tmp: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· identity (AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· (AddEquivUnitInvMor Trans (Ob1 D1)
   · AddEquivUnit Trans (Ob1 D1))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
tmp: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· identity (AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· identity
    (AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (f3 · Mor3 D2) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1 · f4)
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
tmp: # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· identity (AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3 Mor · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1
· (AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (Ob3 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (Ob3 D2))

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3 Mor · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1
· (AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (Ob3 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (Ob3 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3 Mor · Mor2 D2
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)) =
Mor2 D1
· (AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (Ob3 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
   · AddEquivCounit Trans (Ob3 D2))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
MPMor3 Mor
· (Mor2 D2
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))) =
Mor2 D1
· (AddEquivCounitInvMor Trans (Ob3 D1)

  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1) · Mor3 D1)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp': postcompose (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor))
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans)
     (Mor3 D1)
   · AddEquivCounitIso Trans
       (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))) =
postcompose (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor))
  (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1) · Mor3 D1)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
postcompose (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor))
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · AddEquivCounitIso Trans
       (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
postcompose (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor))
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · AddEquivCounitIso Trans
       (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp':= AddEquivCounitUnit' Trans (Ob1 D1): (AddEquivCounitIso Trans
   (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
 :
 PT
 ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans
     (AddEquiv2 Trans
        (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))),
 AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1) ⟧) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp': # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans
    (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans ∙ AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp': # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· AddEquivCounitIso Trans
    (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans)
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor2 Mor

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D2) = Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor
MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor2 Mor

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D2) = Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor
to_inv
  (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D2) = Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor
to_inv (MPMor1 Mor · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D2) = Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor
MPMor1 Mor · to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D2) = Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor
MPMor1 Mor
· (to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D2))
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2))) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
tmp:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D2) = Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor
Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
   · MPMor2 Mor)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1)
   · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)))
· MPMor2 Mor
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
Mor: TriMor (InvRotDTri PT D1) (InvRotDTri PT D2)
Mor1 (InvRotDTri PT D1) · MPMor2 Mor =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) (Mor3 D1))
· inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1))
· MPMor2 Mor
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
→ pr1 (∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥)

D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:

· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
pr1 (∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
pr1 (∥ TriMor D1 D2 ∥)

:

· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))

((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:

· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))

PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
  ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
    :
    PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
    AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
  (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMor3 ?M · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 ?M)

f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),

H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
  ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
    :
    PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
    AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
  (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
  ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
    :
    PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
    AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
  (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧

        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
 exact (MPMor2 Mor).
        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 Mor).
        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
 exact ((inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1)))
                   · (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor))
                   · (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMorComms
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
      · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
      · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
      · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
      · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))) · Mor1 D2 =
Mor1 D1
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
        · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
        · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
  ((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
    :
    PT ⟦ Ob1 D1,
    AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
   · # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
  (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) 
     (MPMor3 Mor)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
      · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
      · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))) · 
Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) 
       (MPMor3 Mor)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
        · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
        · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))

        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMor1
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
      · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
      · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))) · Mor1 D2 =
Mor1 D1
· MPMor2
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
        · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
        · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
 exact (MPComm2 Mor).
        
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMor2
  (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
      · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
      · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2))) · Mor2 D2 =
Mor2 D1
· MPMor3
    (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
        · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
        · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
 exact (ExtMor2_Comm2 D1 D2 Mor).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
f3: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
f4: PT ⟦ AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1),
AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2) ⟧
H: f3 · Mor3 D2 = Mor3 D1 · f4
D1':= InvRotDTri PT D1: DTri
D2':= InvRotDTri PT D2: DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D1' D2' (# (AddEquiv2 Trans) f3)
((AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D1)
:
PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, AddEquiv2 Trans (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D1)) ⟧)
· # (AddEquiv2 Trans) f4 · inv_from_z_iso (AddEquivUnitIso Trans (Ob1 D2)))
(ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H): ∥ TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H) ∥
Ext: TExt (ExtMor2_Comm D1 D2 f3 f4 H)
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D1' D2'
MPMor3
  (make_MPMor
     (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
         · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
         · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
     (make_MPMorComms
        (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
            · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
            · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
        (MPComm2 Mor) (ExtMor2_Comm2 D1 D2 Mor)))
· Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1
       (make_MPMor
          (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
              · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
              · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
          (make_MPMorComms
             (make_MPMorMors (MPMor2 Mor) (MPMor3 Mor)
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D1))
                 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 Mor)
                 · AddEquivCounitIso Trans (Ob3 D2)))
             (MPComm2 Mor) (ExtMor2_Comm2 D1 D2 Mor))))
 exact (ExtMor2_Comm3 D1 D2 Mor).
  Defined.


  (** ** Rotations of DTris *)

  Definition RotDTriMor {D1 D2 : @DTri PT} (M : TriMor D1 D2) :
    TriMor (@RotDTri PT PT D1) (@RotDTri PT PT D2) := RotTriMor M.

  Definition InvRotDTriMor {D1 D2 : @DTri PT} (M : TriMor D1 D2) :
    TriMor (@InvRotDTri PT PT D1) (@InvRotDTri PT PT D2) := InvRotTriMor M.

End rotation_isos.


(** * Composition is zero *)
(** ** Introduction
Composition of consecutive morphisms of a distinguished triangle is 0.
 *)
Section comp_zero.

  Context {PT : PreTriang}.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D2 D (identity (Ob1 D)) (Mor1 D) (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)): ∥ TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)) ∥
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D2 D (identity (Ob1 D)) (Mor1 D) (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)): ∥ TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)) ∥
isaprop
  (Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D2 D (identity (Ob1 D)) 
  (Mor1 D) (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)): ∥ TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)) ∥
TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
→ Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
  ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D2 D (identity (Ob1 D)) (Mor1 D) (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)): ∥ TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)) ∥
isaprop
  (Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D))
 apply to_has_homsets.
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D2 D (identity (Ob1 D)) (Mor1 D) (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)): ∥ TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)) ∥
TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
→ Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
  ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext':= DExt PT D2 D (identity (Ob1 D)) (Mor1 D) (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)): ∥ TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D)) ∥
Ext: TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext: TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext: TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
M:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D2 D
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext: TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
M:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D2 D
Mor2 D2 · MPMor3 M =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
D2:= TrivialDTri PT (Ob1 D): DTri
Ext: TExt (idpath (identity (Ob1 D) · Mor1 D))
M:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D2 D
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (to_Zero PT) · Ext =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)

      apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor2 D · Mor3 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob2 D)
  (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor2 D · Mor3 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob2 D)
  (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D))

    exact (DTriCompZero (RotDTri PT D)).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
  (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D))

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
  (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D))

    exact (DTriCompZero (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D))).
  Qed.

End comp_zero.


(** ** Introduction
We construct the short exact sequences out from distinguished triangles. These can be used to define
the long exact sequences associated to a distinguished triangle. Suppose (X, Y, Z, f, g, h) is a
distinguished triangle. Then for every object W we have shortshortexact sequences
      Mor(W, X) --> Mor(W, Y) --> Mor(W, Z)    and    Mor(Z, W) --> Mor(Y, W) --> Mor(X, W)
These shortshortexact sequences are constructed in  [DTriSSE1_ShortShortExact_from_object] and
[DTriSSE1_ShortShortExact_to_object].
 *)
Section short_short_exact_sequences.

  Context {PT : PreTriang}.

  Local Opaque ZeroArrow.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
MorphismPair abgr_Abelian

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
MorphismPair abgr_Abelian

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian ⟦ ?a, ?b ⟧
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian ⟦ ?b, ?c ⟧

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
 exact (@to_abgr PT X (Ob1 D)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
 exact (@to_abgr PT X (Ob2 D)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
 exact (@to_abgr PT X (Ob3 D)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian ⟦ (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat,
(X --> Ob2 D)%abgrcat ⟧
 exact ((to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) (Mor1 D))).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian ⟦ (X --> Ob2 D)%abgrcat,
(X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat ⟧
 exact ((to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) (Mor2 D))).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D)
  (Mor1 D)
· to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob2 D)
    (Ob3 D) (Mor2 D) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
  (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D)
  (Mor1 D)
· to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob2 D)
    (Ob3 D) (Mor2 D) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
  (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
∏ x : (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat,
(to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob1 D)
   (Ob2 D) (Mor1 D)
 · to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob2 D)
     (Ob3 D) (Mor2 D)) x =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
  (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
(to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob1 D)
   (Ob2 D) (Mor1 D)
 · to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob2 D)
     (Ob3 D) (Mor2 D)) x =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
  (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat

   (Ob2 D) (Mor1 D)

     (Ob3 D) (Mor2 D)) x =
to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT X (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)) x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
to_postmor X (Mor2 D) (to_postmor X (Mor1 D) x) =
to_postmor X (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D))
  x

x: (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat

X: PT
x: (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
 exact (DTriCompZero D).
  Qed.

 exact tmp.

D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)

D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext':= DExt PT (RotDTri PT D') (RotDTri PT D) y
(ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob2 (RotDTri PT D')) (Ob2 (RotDTri PT D))) e: ∥ TExt e ∥
∥ hfiber
    (KernelArrow
       (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)))
    (pr1 (y,, yH)) ∥

(ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob2 (RotDTri PT D')) (Ob2 (RotDTri PT D))) e: ∥ TExt e ∥
TExt e
→ pr1

         (KernelArrow

               (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)))
         (pr1 (y,, yH)) ∥)

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) y =

D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
(λ x : Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X),
 KernelArrow
   (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)) x =
 pr1 (y,, yH)) ?pr1

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) X (to_Zero PT)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
 exact (((factorization1_epi
                   abgr_Abelian
                   (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)) : abgr_Abelian⟦_, _⟧) :
                  abelian_group_morphism _ _)
                 (MPMor1 Mor)).
      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) X (to_Zero PT)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
(λ x : Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X),
 KernelArrow
   (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)) x =
 pr1 (y,, yH))
  (((factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
       (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
     :
     abgr_Abelian
     ⟦ Ob1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X),
     Abelian.Image
       (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)) ⟧)
    :
    abelian_group_morphism
      (Ob1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
      (Abelian.Image
         (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))))
     (MPMor1 Mor))

D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)

D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
     (MPMor1 Mor)) = pr1 (y,, yH)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) y =

e: y · Mor2 D =

Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
comm1:= MPComm1 Mor: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 D = Mor1 D' · MPMor2 Mor
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
     (MPMor1 Mor)) = pr1 (y,, yH)

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
comm1: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 D = MPMor2 Mor

  (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))

comm1: MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 D = MPMor2 Mor

  (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) y =

D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =

· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))

     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= TrivialDTri PT X: DTri
e: y · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) X (to_Zero PT)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= ExtMor1 D' D y
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D') (Ob3 D)) e Ext: TriMor D' D
tmp:= factorization1
  (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)): Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X) =
factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
· factorization1_monic abgr_Abelian
(Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X))
     (MPMor1 Mor)) = MPMor1 Mor · Mor1 D

        exact (! abelian_group_morphism_eq tmp (MPMor1 Mor)).

  (KernelArrow
     (Image (ShortShortExactData_from_object D X)))
 use KernelArrowisMonic.
  Qed.

abgr_Abelian ⟦ (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat,
(Ob2 D --> X)%abgrcat ⟧
 exact (binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) X (Mor2 D))).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
abgr_Abelian ⟦ (Ob2 D --> X)%abgrcat,
(Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat ⟧
 exact (binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) X (Mor1 D))).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
  (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) X (Mor2 D))
· binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
    (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) X (Mor1 D)) =
ZeroArrow (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
  (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) X (Mor2 D))
· binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
    (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) X (Mor1 D)) =
ZeroArrow (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
∏ x : (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat,
(binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
   (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) X (Mor2 D))
 · binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
     (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) X
        (Mor1 D))) x =
ZeroArrow (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
(binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
   (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) X (Mor2 D))
 · binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
     (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) X
        (Mor1 D))) x =
ZeroArrow (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
(binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
   (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob2 D) (Ob3 D) X (Mor2 D))
 · binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism
     (to_premor_monoidfun PT (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D) X
        (Mor1 D))) x =
to_premor_abelian_group_morphism PT (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D) X
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)) x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
to_premor X (Mor1 D) (to_premor X (Mor2 D) x) =
to_premor X (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
Mor1 D · (Mor2 D · x) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D) · x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
Mor1 D · Mor2 D · x =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D) · x

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
 exact (DTriCompZero D).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
ShortShortExactData abgr_Abelian abgr_Zero

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
ShortShortExactData abgr_Abelian abgr_Zero

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
MorphismPair abgr_Abelian
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
Mor1 ?MP · Mor2 ?MP =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (Ob1 ?MP) (Ob3 ?MP)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
MorphismPair abgr_Abelian
 exact (MorphismPair_to_object D X).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
Mor1 (MorphismPair_to_object D X)
· Mor2 (MorphismPair_to_object D X) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (Ob1 (MorphismPair_to_object D X))
  (Ob3 (MorphismPair_to_object D X))
 exact (ShortShortExactData_Eq_to_object D X).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
  (Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (Image_Eq (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))

  
PT: PreTriang

isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
  (Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (Image_Eq (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))

∏
D0 : hfiber (Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
       0%addmonoid,
∥ hfiber
    (KernelArrow
       (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
    (pr1 D0) ∥

  (KernelArrow
     (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))

    (pr1 D0) ∥

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor1 D · y = 0%abgrcat
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
tmp:= PreAdditive_unel_zero PT (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D)
  (Ob2 D'): to_unel (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D') = ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D')
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D') = 0%abgrcat

        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor1 D · y = 0%abgrcat
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
tmp:= PreAdditive_unel_zero PT (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D)
  (Ob2 D'): 0%abgrcat = ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D')
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob2 D') = 0%abgrcat
 exact (! tmp).
      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
∥ hfiber
    (KernelArrow
       (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
    (pr1 (y,, yH)) ∥

      
PT: PreTriang

X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =

e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext':= DExt PT D D' (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D')) y e: ∥ TExt e ∥
∥ hfiber
    (KernelArrow
       (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
    (pr1 (y,, yH)) ∥

TExt e
→ pr1
    (∥ hfiber
         (KernelArrow
            (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
         (pr1 (y,, yH)) ∥)

Ext: TExt e
pr1

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
(λ x : Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X),
 KernelArrow
   (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)) x =
 pr1 (y,, yH)) ?pr1

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
 exact (((factorization1_epi
                   abgr_Abelian
                   (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)) : abgr_Abelian⟦_, _⟧) : abelian_group_morphism _ _)
                 (MPMor3 Mor)).
      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
(λ x : Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X),
 KernelArrow
   (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)) x =
 pr1 (y,, yH))
  (((factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
       (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
     :
     abgr_Abelian
     ⟦ Ob1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X),
     Abelian.Image
       (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)) ⟧)
    :
    abelian_group_morphism
      (Ob1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
      (Abelian.Image
         (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))))
     (MPMor3 Mor))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
     (MPMor3 Mor)) = pr1 (y,, yH)
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =

D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
comm2:= MPComm2 Mor: MPMor2 Mor · Mor2 D' = Mor2 D · MPMor3 Mor
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
     (MPMor3 Mor)) = pr1 (y,, yH)

e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =

comm2: MPMor2 Mor = Mor2 D · MPMor3 Mor

  (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
     (MPMor3 Mor)) = pr1 (y,, yH)

        
PT: PreTriang

X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =

Mor1 D · y

comm2: MPMor2 Mor = Mor2 D · MPMor3 Mor

  (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))

     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
     (MPMor3 Mor)) = Mor2 D · MPMor3 Mor

        
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
y: Ob2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)
yH: Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) y =
0%addmonoid
D':= InvRotDTri PT (TrivialDTri PT X): DTri
e: ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob1 D') · Mor1 D' =
Mor1 D · y
Ext: TExt e
Mor:= TExtMor Ext: TriMor D D'
tmp:= factorization1
  (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)): Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X) =
factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
· factorization1_monic abgr_Abelian
(Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
KernelArrow
  (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (factorization1_epi abgr_Abelian
     (Mor1 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
     (MPMor3 Mor)) = Mor2 D · MPMor3 Mor

        exact (! abelian_group_morphism_eq tmp (MPMor3 Mor)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
Monics.isMonic
  (KernelArrow
     (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
 use KernelArrowisMonic.
  Qed.

D: DTri

ShortShortExact abgr_Abelian

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
ShortShortExactData abgr_Abelian
  (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
 exact (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X)))
  (Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
  (Image_Eq (ShortShortExactData_to_object D X))
 exact (ShortShortExact_isKernel_to_object D X).
  Defined.

End short_short_exact_sequences.


(** ** Introduction
Suppose you have a morphism of distinguished triangles represented by the following diagram
                                X  -f-> Y  -g-> Z  -h->  X[1]
                             φ1 |    φ2 |    φ3 |    φ1[1] |
                                X' -f-> Y' -g-> Z' -h-> X'[1].
The five lemma for triangulated categories says that if φ1 and φ2 are isomorphisms, then so is φ3.
Using rotations we show also the following versions: if φ1 and φ3 are isomorphisms, then so is φ2,
and if φ2 and φ3 are isomorphisms, then so is φ1. These are proved in [TriangulatedFiveLemma],
TriangulatedFiveLemma2], and [TriangulatedFiveLemma1], respectively.
 *)
Section triangulated_five_lemma.

  Context {PT : PreTriang}.

  Local Opaque ZeroArrow.

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
FiveRowObs

  
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
FiveRowObs

X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
(FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X)
 · FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X)) x =
ZeroArrow (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X))
  (FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)) x

  (FOb2 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X))

D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)

  (FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X))
  (FOb5 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)) x

D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)

 · FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X)) x =

  (FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X))
  (FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
to_postmor X (Mor2 D) (to_postmor X (Mor1 D) x) =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
x · Mor1 D · Mor2 D =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
x · (Mor1 D · Mor2 D) =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x

D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
tmp:= DTriCompZero D: Mor1 D · Mor2 D = ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
x · (Mor1 D · Mor2 D) =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
tmp: x · (Mor1 D · Mor2 D) = x · ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
x · (Mor1 D · Mor2 D) =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x

x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
tmp: x · (Mor1 D · Mor2 D) = x · ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D)
x · ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) (Ob3 D) =

x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) X (Ob3 D) =

     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x

X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
to_unel X (Ob3 D) =

     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_from_object D X)
0%abgrcat =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (X --> Ob1 D)%abgrcat
     (X --> Ob3 D)%abgrcat) x
 apply idpath.

(AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 (RotDTri PT D)))

x
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob2 (RotDTri PT D))
(AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 (RotDTri PT D)))
x · (Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))) =
pr1

     (X --> AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D))%abgrcat) x

0%abgrcat =

PT: PreTriang

FiveRowExacts (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FEq1 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FEq2 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FEq3 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FEq1 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))))
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (isExact_Eq abgr_Abelian
     (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
     (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
     (FEq1 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X)))
 exact_op (@ShortShortExact_isKernel_from_object PT D X).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FEq2 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))))
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (isExact_Eq abgr_Abelian
     (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
     (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
     (FEq2 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X)))
 exact_op (@ShortShortExact_isKernel_from_object PT (RotDTri PT D) X).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (FEq3 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))))
  (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
  (isExact_Eq abgr_Abelian
     (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
     (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_from_object D X))
     (FEq3 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_from_object D X)))

      exact_op (@ShortShortExact_isKernel_from_object PT (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) X).
  Qed.

  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 X)

X: PT
abgr_Abelian
⟦ FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 X),
FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 X) ⟧

D1, D2: DTri

PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
⟦ FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 X),
FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 X) ⟧
 exact (to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT _ _ _ (MPMor1 M)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
abgr_Abelian
⟦ FOb2 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 X),
FOb2 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 X) ⟧
 exact (to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism PT _ _ _ (MPMor2 M)).

M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb4 (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 X)
Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M = MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2
 exact (! MPComm1 M).
  Qed.

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) · x =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero
     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat) x
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb2 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
Mor2 D · Mor3 D · x =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero
     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob2 D --> X)%abgrcat) x

D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)

     (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat) x

X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
