PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
tmp:= DTriCompZero (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)): Mor1 (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) · Mor2 (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)))
(Ob3 (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)))
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) · x =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero
     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
tmp:= DTriCompZero (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)): Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D) (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D))
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) · x =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero
     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
tmp:= DTriCompZero (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)): Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D) (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D))
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) · x =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero
     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat) x

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
tmp: postcompose x (Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D))) =
postcompose x (ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D) (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D)))
Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) · x =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero
     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat) x

     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat) x

D: DTri

x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
tmp: Mor3 D · to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D)) · x =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D) (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D)) · x
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob3 D)
  (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D)) · x =
pr1

     (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob2 D) --> X)%abgrcat

x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
to_unel (Ob3 D) X =

D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
0%abgrcat =

  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero

 apply idpath.

PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero PT) (Ob1 D) X =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat) x

      
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
to_unel (Ob1 D) X =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat) x
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRowObs_to_object D X)
0%abgrcat =
pr1
  (ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (Ob3 D --> X)%abgrcat
     (Ob1 D --> X)%abgrcat) x
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

D: DTri

D: DTri
X: PT
FiveRowExacts (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X)

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FEq1 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X))
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FEq2 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X))

D: DTri
X: PT

  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FEq3 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X))

    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FEq1 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))))
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (isExact_Eq abgr_Abelian
     (FDiff1 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
     (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
     (FEq1 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X)))

      exact_op (@ShortShortExact_isKernel_to_object PT (RotDTri PT (RotDTri PT D)) X).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FEq2 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))))
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (isExact_Eq abgr_Abelian
     (FDiff2 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
     (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
     (FEq2 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X)))
 exact_op (@ShortShortExact_isKernel_to_object PT (RotDTri PT D) X).
    
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isExact abgr_Abelian
  (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (FEq3 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X))
 
PT: PreTriang
D: DTri
X: PT
isKernel (Abelian.to_Zero abgr_Abelian)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))))
  (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
  (isExact_Eq abgr_Abelian
     (FDiff3 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
     (FDiff4 (TriangulatedRowDiffs_to_object D X))
     (FEq3 (TriangulatedRowDiffsEq_to_object D X)))
 exact_op (@ShortShortExact_isKernel_to_object PT D X).
  Qed.

M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT

FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 X) ⟧
 exact (to_premor_abelian_group_morphism PT _ _ _ (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M))).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT

 exact (to_premor_abelian_group_morphism PT _ _ _ (MPMor3 M)).

X: PT

 exact (to_premor_abelian_group_morphism PT _ _ _ (MPMor1 M)).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang

D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
FiveRowMorsComm (TriangulatedRowMors_to_object M X)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M)
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb2 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor2 M · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb4 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1))
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
· to_inv (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M))

      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D2)) =
to_inv
  (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1)
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M))

      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1)
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1)
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor2 M)
 
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2) =
# (AddEquiv1 Trans) (Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M)

      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb1 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M
 exact (MPComm1 M).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb2 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor3 M · Mor3 D2 =
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 M)
 exact (DComm3 M).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb3 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor2 M · Mor2 D2 = Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 M
 exact (MPComm2 M).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
X: PT
x: FOb4 (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 X)
MPMor1 M · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · MPMor2 M
 exact (MPComm1 M).
  Qed.

Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)

D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2

  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)

  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))

Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)

Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))

M: TriMor D1 D2

  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))

  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (FMor5 Mor1)

      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (FMor1 Mor1)
 exact (@abgr_Additive_is_iso_postmor PT _ _ _ _ H1).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (FMor2 Mor1)
 exact (@abgr_Additive_is_iso_postmor PT _ _ _ _ H2).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (FMor4 Mor1)
 exact (abgr_Additive_is_iso_postmor
                 (Ob3 D2) _ _ (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv1 (@Trans PT)) H1)).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
is_z_isomorphism (FMor5 Mor1)
 exact (abgr_Additive_is_iso_postmor
                 (Ob3 D2) _ _ (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv1 (@Trans PT)) H2)).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor2)
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
e2: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor2)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)

    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor2)

      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor1 Mor2)
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor2 Mor2)
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor4 Mor2)
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor5 Mor2)

      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor1 Mor2)
 exact (abgr_Additive_is_iso_premor
                 _ _ (Ob3 D1) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv1 (@Trans PT)) H2)).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor2 Mor2)
 exact (abgr_Additive_is_iso_premor
                 _ _ (Ob3 D1) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv1 (@Trans PT)) H1)).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor4 Mor2)
 exact (@abgr_Additive_is_iso_premor PT _ _ _ _ H2).
      
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
is_z_isomorphism (FMor5 Mor2)
 exact (@abgr_Additive_is_iso_premor PT _ _ _ _ H1).
    
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
Mor1:= TriangulatedMorphism_from_object M (Ob3 D2): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D1 (Ob3 D2))
  (TriangulatedRow_from_object D2 (Ob3 D2))
Mor2:= TriangulatedMorphism_to_object M (Ob3 D1): FiveRowMorphism
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D2 (Ob3 D1))
  (TriangulatedRow_to_object D1 (Ob3 D1))
e1: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor1)
e2: is_z_isomorphism (FMor3 Mor2)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)

    exact (@abgr_Additive_premor_postmor_is_iso PT _ _ (MPMor3 M) e2 e1).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)

    exact (TriangulatedFiveLemma
             (InvRotDTriMor M) (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv2 Trans) H2) H1).
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)

  
PT: PreTriang
D1, D2: DTri
M: TriMor D1 D2
H1: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor2 M)
H2: is_z_isomorphism (MPMor3 M)
is_z_isomorphism (MPMor1 M)

    exact (TriangulatedFiveLemma
             (InvRotDTriMor (InvRotDTriMor M))
             (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv2 Trans) H1)
             (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism (AddEquiv2 Trans) H2)).
  Qed.

End triangulated_five_lemma.


(** ** Change triangles in extension using isomorphisms *)
Section Ext_isomorphisms.

  
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 I1 · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2)) =
f2 · Mor2 D2

  
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 I1 · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2)) =
f2 · Mor2 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 I1 · h) · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D1 · MPMor3 I1 · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1 · Mor2 D1' · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1 · (Mor2 D1' · h) · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1
· (MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2 · Mor2 D2')
· MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) = f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1 · (MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2)
· Mor2 D2' · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) = f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1 · (MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2) · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2' · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) = f2 · Mor2 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1 · MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2' · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) = f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I1 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso2 I1)
· f2 · MPMor2 I2 · Mor2 D2'
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
identity (Ob2 D1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2 · Mor2 D2'
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
f2 · MPMor2 I2 · Mor2 D2'
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
f2 · MPMor2 I2
· (Mor2 D2' · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
f2
· (MPMor2 I2
   · (Mor2 D2'
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I2
· (Mor2 D2' · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)) =
Mor2 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
MPMor2 I2 · Mor2 D2'
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2) = Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D2 · MPMor3 I2
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2) = Mor2 D2
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D2
· (MPMor3 I2
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)) =
Mor2 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D2 · identity (Ob3 D2) = Mor2 D2
 apply id_right.
  Qed.

D1', D2': Tri

I2: TriIso D2 D2'

f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧

h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧

· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (MPMor3 I1 · h
   · (Mor3 D2'
      · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I2))))

· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2)

I2: TriIso D2 D2'

f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧

h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧

D1', D2': Tri

I2: TriIso D2 D2'

f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧

h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =

· Mor2 D2'

· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =

D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (MPMor3 I1
   · (h
      · (Mor3 D2'
         · identity (AddEquiv1 Trans (Ob1 D2')))))

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (MPMor3 I1 · (h · Mor3 D2'))
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1)
· (MPMor3 I1 · (h · Mor3 D2'))
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · MPMor3 I1
· (h · Mor3 D2')
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · MPMor3 I1
· h · Mor3 D2'

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
identity (Ob3 D1') · h · Mor3 D2'
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2) = h · Mor3 D2'

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2)
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· (# (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
   · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2)) =
MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2)
 
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2) =
MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I1) · Mor3 D1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans) (MPMor1 I2)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
TExt H

  
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
TExt H

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D1 · ?f3 = f2 · Mor2 D2
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1 = ?f3 · Mor3 D2

    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
PT ⟦ Ob3 D1, Ob3 D2 ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 I1 · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2)).
    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor2 D1 · (MPMor3 I1 · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2)) =
f2 · Mor2 D2
 exact (DExtIso_Comm1 D1' D2' I1 I2 H h comm1 comm2).
    
PT: PreTriangData
D1, D2: DTri
D1', D2': Tri
I1: TriIso D1 D1'
I2: TriIso D2 D2'
f1: PT ⟦ Ob1 D1, Ob1 D2 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ Ob2 D1, Ob2 D2 ⟧
H: f1 · Mor1 D2 = Mor1 D1 · f2
h: PT ⟦ Ob3 D1', Ob3 D2' ⟧
comm1: Mor2 D1' · h =
MPMor2 (TriIsoInv I1) · f2 · MPMor2 I2
· Mor2 D2'
comm2: Mor3 D1'
· # (AddEquiv1 Trans)
    (MPMor1 (TriIsoInv I1) · f1 · MPMor1 I2) =
h · Mor3 D2'
Mor3 D1 · # (AddEquiv1 Trans) f1 =
MPMor3 I1 · h · MPMor3 (TriIsoInv I2) · Mor3 D2
 exact (DExtIso_Comm2 D1' D2' I1 I2 H h comm1 comm2).
  Defined.

End Ext_isomorphisms.


(** ** Change triangles in octa using isomorphisms *)
Section Octa_isomorphisms.

  
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMorMors
  (make_MorphismPair
     (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
     (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)))
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O)))

  
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMorMors
  (make_MorphismPair
     (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
     (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)))
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O)))

    
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
PT
⟦ Ob1
    (make_MorphismPair
       (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
       (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))),
Ob1
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) ⟧
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
PT
⟦ Ob2
    (make_MorphismPair
       (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
       (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))),
Ob2
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) ⟧
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧

H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3

PT
⟦ Ob3
    (make_MorphismPair
       (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
       (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))),
Ob3
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) ⟧

    
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
PT
⟦ Ob1
    (make_MorphismPair
       (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
       (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))),
Ob1
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 I1).
    
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧

g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧

H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)

f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧

I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')

II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3

PT
⟦ Ob2
    (make_MorphismPair
       (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
       (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))),
Ob2
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 I3).
    
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
PT
⟦ Ob3
    (make_MorphismPair
       (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
       (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2))),
Ob3
  (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
     (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) ⟧
 exact (MPMor3 I2).
  Defined.

  
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMorComms
  (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3 II12
     II13 II23 O)

  
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMorComms
  (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3 II12
     II13 II23 O)

    
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMor1
  (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3 II12
     II13 II23 O)
· Mor1
    (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
       (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) =
Mor1
  (make_MorphismPair
     (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
     (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)))
· MPMor2
    (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3
       II12 II13 II23 O)
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMor2
  (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3 II12
     II13 II23 O)
· Mor2
    (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
       (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) =
Mor2
  (make_MorphismPair
     (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
     (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)))
· MPMor3
    (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3
       II12 II13 II23 O)

    
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMor1
  (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3 II12
     II13 II23 O)
· Mor1
    (make_MorphismPair (dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O))
       (dirprod_pr2 (pr1 O))) =
Mor1
  (make_MorphismPair
     (MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3))
     (MPMor3 I3 · OctaMor2 O
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I2)))
· MPMor2
    (OctaIsoMPMorMors H1 H2 H3 H1' H2' H3' I1 I2 I3
       II12 II13 II23 O)
 
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMor3 I1 · dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O) =
MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3) · MPMor3 I3
 
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMor3 I1 · dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O) =
MPMor3 I1 · OctaMor1 O
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
   · MPMor3 I3)
 
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
MPMor3 I1 · dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O) =
MPMor3 I1
· (OctaMor1 O
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
      · MPMor3 I3))

      
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O) =
OctaMor1 O
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
   · MPMor3 I3)

      
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
g1': PT ⟦ y1', z1' ⟧
g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
tmp:= is_inverse_in_precat2 (TriMor_is_iso3 I3): is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
· MPMor3 I3 =
identity (Ob3 (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3'))
dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O) =
OctaMor1 O
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
   · MPMor3 I3)

      
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
g1: PT ⟦ y1, z1 ⟧
g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧
f3': PT ⟦ z2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧

g2': PT ⟦ z1', x2' ⟧
g3': PT ⟦ x2', AddEquiv1 Trans y1' ⟧
h2': PT ⟦ z1', y2' ⟧
h3': PT ⟦ y2', AddEquiv1 Trans x1' ⟧
H1': isDTri (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
H3': isDTri (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
I1: TriIso (make_Tri f1 f2 f3) (make_Tri f1' f2' f3')
I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
II12: MPMor1 I2 = MPMor2 I1
II13: MPMor1 I1 = MPMor1 I3
II23: MPMor2 I2 = MPMor2 I3
O: Octa H1' H2' H3'
tmp: OctaMor1 O
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
   · MPMor3 I3) =
OctaMor1 O
· identity (Ob3 (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3'))
dirprod_pr1 (pr1 O) =
OctaMor1 O
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (TriMor_is_iso3 I3)
   · MPMor3 I3)

      
PT: PreTriang
x1, x2, y1, y2, z1, z2: PT
f1: PT ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧
f2: PT ⟦ y1, z2 ⟧
f3: PT ⟦ z2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧

g2: PT ⟦ z1, x2 ⟧
g3: PT ⟦ x2, AddEquiv1 Trans y1 ⟧
h2: PT ⟦ z1, y2 ⟧
h3: PT ⟦ y2, AddEquiv1 Trans x1 ⟧
H1: isDTri (make_Tri f1 f2 f3)
H2: isDTri (make_Tri g1 g2 g3)
H3: isDTri (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
x1', x2', y1', y2', z1', z2': PT
f1': PT ⟦ x1', y1' ⟧
f2': PT ⟦ y1', z2' ⟧

H2': isDTri (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')

I2: TriIso (make_Tri g1 g2 g3) (make_Tri g1' g2' g3')
I3: TriIso (make_Tri (f1 · g1) h2 h3)
  (make_Tri (f1' · g1') h2' h3')
